title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. levigatum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. levigatum, also known as alpine rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Alpine rockrose is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections.
